title: The Café Where We Met
content: Whenever Olivia walked past the little café on the corner, she slowed down for a moment. Five years earlier, that was where she had met Ethan after accidentally taking the wrong seat. What began as a brief apology turned into a conversation that lasted until closing time. Even after all those years, they still returned to the same table every month. The menu had changed, the walls had been painted, and new employees worked there, but one thing remained the same. Every visit reminded them that ordinary places often become extraordinary because of the memories we create inside them.
